saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.enabled.description: Enable project-wide indexing of documentation and knowledge files for faster analysis searches.
saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.enabled.title: %config.projectIndex.enabled.title%

saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.sources.description: Directories to index for project knowledge. Each entry: path (relative to workspace root) and fileTypes. Non-existent dirs are skipped.

path.description: Directory path relative to workspace root.

fileTypes.description: File types to include (e.g. .md, .txt, .json, .yaml, .toml, .xml, .arb, .rules, .rst, .adoc, .gradle, .kts, .ini, .properties, .env, .sql, .proto, dockerfile, .tf, .csproj, .sln, .sh, .ps1, .http, makefile, requirements, pipfile).

saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.sources.title: %config.projectIndex.sources.title%

saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.includeRoo.description: Index matching files at workspace root (README.md, CHANGELOG.md, etc.).
saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.includeRoo.title: %config.projectIndex.includeRootFiles.title%

saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.includeRep.description: Index completed (non-active, non-trashed) log files from the reports directory.
saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.includeRep.title: %config.projectIndex.includeReports.title%

saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.maxFilesPe.description: Maximum number of files to index per source directory.
saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.maxFilesPe.title: %config.projectIndex.maxFilesPerSource.title%

saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.refreshInt.description: Seconds between automatic index refreshes. 0 = only on demand.
saropaLogCapture.projectIndex.refreshInt.title: %config.projectIndex.refreshInterval.title%

saropaLogCapture.ai.contextLines.description: Number of surrounding log lines to include when using Explain with AI
saropaLogCapture.ai.contextLines.title: %config.ai.contextLines.title%

saropaLogCapture.ai.includeIntegrationDa.description: Include performance, HTTP, and terminal context in AI error explanation
saropaLogCapture.ai.includeIntegrationDa.title: %config.ai.includeIntegrationData.title%

saropaLogCapture.ai.cacheExplanations.description: Cache AI explanations to avoid repeated API calls for the same error
saropaLogCapture.ai.cacheExplanations.title: %config.ai.cacheExplanations.title%

saropaLogCapture.ai.modelPreference.description: Preferred LM vendor for Explain with AI (e.g. copilot, claude). Empty = first available.
saropaLogCapture.ai.modelPreference.title: %config.ai.modelPreference.title%

saropaLogCapture.share.gistPublic.description: Create public gists (visible to anyone) vs. secret gists (link-only access) when sharing investigations via GitHub Gist.
saropaLogCapture.share.gistPublic.title: %config.share.gistPublic.title%

saropaLogCapture.share.includeNotes.description: Include investigation notes in shared gist README.
saropaLogCapture.share.includeNotes.title: %config.share.includeNotes.title%

saropaLogCapture.share.uploadPutUrl.description: Optional PUT URL for sharing (e.g. presigned S3/Azure Blob URL). When set, Share menu shows "Upload to configured URL".
saropaLogCapture.share.uploadPutUrl.title: %config.share.uploadPutUrl.title%

saropaLogCapture.share.sharedFolderPath.description: Optional path for team shared folder (absolute or relative to workspace). When set, Share menu shows "Save to shared folder". Teammates can open the .slc from this path.
saropaLogCapture.share.sharedFolderPath.title: %config.share.sharedFolderPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.adapters.description: Integration adapters to enable (e.g. packages, buildCi, git, environment, testResults, coverage, crashDumps, windowsEvents, docker, performance, terminal, linuxLogs, crashlytics). Session adapters run at start/end; crashlytics shows the Crashlytics sidebar. Clear to disable all.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.adapters.title: %config.integrations.adapters.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.so.description: Build/CI data source: file (last-build.json), github (Actions API), azure (Azure DevOps), or gitlab (GitLab CI).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.so.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.source.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.bu.description: Path (relative to workspace) to last-build.json for build/CI integration (when source is file).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.bu.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.buildInfoPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.fi.description: If last-build.json is older than this many minutes, it is ignored.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.fi.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.fileMaxAgeMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.az.description: Azure DevOps organization name (required when buildCi source is azure).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.az.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.azureOrg.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.az.description: Azure DevOps project name (required when buildCi source is azure).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.az.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.azureProject.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.gi.description: GitLab project ID, numeric or URL-encoded path (required when buildCi source is gitlab).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.gi.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.gitlabProjectId.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.gi.description: GitLab API base URL for self-hosted instances.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.buildCi.gi.title: %config.integrations.buildCi.gitlabBaseUrl.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.descri.description: Include git describe (e.g. v1.2.3-5-gabc1234) in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.descri.title: %config.integrations.git.describeInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.uncomm.description: Include uncommitted files summary in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.uncomm.title: %config.integrations.git.uncommittedInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.stashI.description: Include stash count in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.stashI.title: %config.integrations.git.stashInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.blameO.description: When opening source from a log line (e.g. stack frame), show git blame (last commit, author) and optional PR link.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.blameO.title: %config.integrations.git.blameOnNavigate.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.includ.description: At session end, capture git blame for file:line references in the log (e.g. stack traces) and store in session meta.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.includ.title: %config.integrations.git.includeLineHistoryInMeta.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.commit.description: Resolve commit hashes to web URLs (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket) in blame and line history.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.git.commit.title: %config.integrations.git.commitLinks.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.environmen.description: Include env block checksum in context header (launch config env, redacted).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.environmen.title: %config.integrations.environment.includeEnvChecksum.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.environmen.description: Paths (relative to workspace) to config files to include content hashes for.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.environmen.title: %config.integrations.environment.configFiles.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.environmen.description: Include config file checksum lines in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.environmen.title: %config.integrations.environment.includeInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.description: Test results source: file (last-test-run.json) or junit (JUnit XML).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.title: %config.integrations.testResults.source.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.description: Path to last test run JSON (when source is file).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.title: %config.integrations.testResults.lastRunPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.description: Path to JUnit XML (when source is junit).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.title: %config.integrations.testResults.junitPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.description: Ignore test results file older than this (hours).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.title: %config.integrations.testResults.fileMaxAgeHours.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.description: List failed test names in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.testResult.title: %config.integrations.testResults.includeFailedListInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.coverage.r.description: Path to coverage report (lcov.info, cobertura.xml, or coverage-summary.json).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.coverage.r.title: %config.integrations.coverage.reportPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.coverage.i.description: Include coverage line in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.coverage.i.title: %config.integrations.coverage.includeInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.description: Path to lint report (ESLint JSON format). Empty to skip lint data.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.title: %config.integrations.codeQuality.lintReportPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.description: Scan referenced source files for comment density and documentation coverage.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.title: %config.integrations.codeQuality.scanComments.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.description: Ignore coverage report older than this many hours (0 = no limit).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.title: %config.integrations.codeQuality.coverageStaleMaxHours.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.description: Include quality summary (low coverage, lint issues) for referenced files in bug reports.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.codeQualit.title: %config.integrations.codeQuality.includeInBugReport.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: Paths to scan for crash dumps (e.g. ${workspaceFolder}, ${env:TEMP}). Empty = workspace + common OS paths.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.searchPaths.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: File extensions for crash dump discovery.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.extensions.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: Minutes before session start to include file mtime.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.leadMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: Minutes after session end to include file mtime.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.lagMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: Max crash dump files to list.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.maxFiles.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: Add crash dumps summary line to header when any found.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.includeInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.description: Copy discovered crash dump files into the log folder for portability.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.crashDumps.title: %config.integrations.crashDumps.copyToSession.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.description: Windows Event Log names to query (Windows only).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.title: %config.integrations.windowsEvents.logs.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.description: Minutes before session start for event query.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.title: %config.integrations.windowsEvents.leadMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.description: Minutes after session end for event query.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.title: %config.integrations.windowsEvents.lagMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.description: Max events to collect per session.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.windowsEve.title: %config.integrations.windowsEvents.maxEvents.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.run.description: Container runtime CLI: docker or podman.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.run.title: %config.integrations.docker.runtime.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.con.description: Override container ID or name (if not inferrable from launch).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.con.title: %config.integrations.docker.containerId.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.con.description: Regex to match container name from docker ps.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.con.title: %config.integrations.docker.containerNamePattern.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.cap.description: Capture container logs for session time range to sidecar.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.cap.title: %config.integrations.docker.captureLogs.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.max.description: Cap container log lines in sidecar.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.max.title: %config.integrations.docker.maxLogLines.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.inc.description: Write full docker inspect output as a sidecar JSON file.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.docker.inc.title: %config.integrations.docker.includeInspect.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.description: Capture CPU and RAM snapshot at session start.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.title: %config.integrations.performance.snapshotAtStart.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.description: Periodically sample free memory during the session and write samples to a .perf.json sidecar.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.title: %config.integrations.performance.sampleDuringSession.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.description: Include system snapshot line in context header.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.title: %config.integrations.performance.includeInHeader.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.description: Path to an external profiler output file (e.g. .cpuprofile, .trace). Copied into the log folder at session end.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.title: %config.integrations.performance.profilerOutputPath.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.description: Capture memory usage of the debug target process (requires active debug session).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.performanc.title: %config.integrations.performance.processMetrics.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.w.description: Which terminals to capture: all open terminals, only the active terminal at session start, or only user-linked terminals.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.w.title: %config.integrations.terminal.whichTerminals.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.w.description: Write captured terminal output to a .terminal.log sidecar at session end.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.w.title: %config.integrations.terminal.writeSidecar.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.p.description: Prefix each captured terminal line with a timestamp.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.p.title: %config.integrations.terminal.prefixTimestamp.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.m.description: Max terminal output lines to buffer per session.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.terminal.m.title: %config.integrations.terminal.maxLines.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.unifiedLog.description: After session end, write basename.unified.jsonl next to the main log: one JSON line per row { "source", "text" } merging main log, .terminal.log, and external sidecars (for sharing or opening one file in the viewer with Sources filter).
saropaLogCapture.integrations.unifiedLog.title: %config.integrations.unifiedLog.writeAtSessionEnd.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.unifiedLog.description: When writing unified JSONL, max lines per source (main log, terminal, each external); longer inputs are truncated from the tail of that source.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.unifiedLog.title: %config.integrations.unifiedLog.maxLinesPerSource.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..description: When to capture Linux system logs: only when targeting WSL, on any remote Linux, or always.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..title: %config.integrations.linuxLogs.when.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..description: Linux log sources to capture at session end.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..title: %config.integrations.linuxLogs.sources.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..description: Minutes before session start to include in log query.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..title: %config.integrations.linuxLogs.leadMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..description: Minutes after session end to include in log query.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..title: %config.integrations.linuxLogs.lagMinutes.title%

saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..description: WSL distribution name (e.g. Ubuntu-22.04). Empty uses the default distribution.
saropaLogCapture.integrations.linuxLogs..title: %config.integrations.linuxLogs.wslDistro.title%

saropaLogCapture.contextWindowSeconds.description: Time window (±seconds) for the Context Popover. When you click 'Show Integration Context' on a log line, the popover shows data from this many seconds before and after the line timestamp.
saropaLogCapture.contextWindowSeconds.title: %config.contextWindowSeconds.title%

saropaLogCapture.loki.enabled.description: Enable Export to Loki. When true and pushUrl is set, the 'Export to Loki' command pushes the current log file to Grafana Loki.
saropaLogCapture.loki.enabled.title: %config.loki.enabled.title%

saropaLogCapture.loki.pushUrl.description: Loki push API URL (e.g. https://logs-prod-XXX.grafana.net/loki/api/v1/push or http://localhost:3100/loki/api/v1/push). Required when Loki export is enabled.
saropaLogCapture.loki.pushUrl.title: %config.loki.pushUrl.title%

saropaLogCapture.replay.defaultMode.description: Default replay mode: use actual line timing when available (timed) or fixed short delay (fast).
saropaLogCapture.replay.defaultMode.title: %config.replay.defaultMode.title%

saropaLogCapture.replay.minLineDelayMs.description: Minimum delay between lines during replay (ms). Prevents replay from being too fast.
saropaLogCapture.replay.minLineDelayMs.title: %config.replay.minLineDelayMs.title%

saropaLogCapture.replay.maxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay between lines during replay (ms). Caps long gaps so replay does not freeze.
saropaLogCapture.replay.maxDelayMs.title: %config.replay.maxDelayMs.title%

saropaLogCapture.sessionListPageSize.description: Logs per page in Project Logs list. Increase to show more per page; decrease if the list feels slow.
saropaLogCapture.sessionListPageSize.title: %config.sessionListPageSize.title%

scripts.compile: npm run generate:db-detector-embed-merge && npm run check-types && npm run lint && npm run verify-nls && node esbuild.js
scripts.compile-tests: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p . --outDir out
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
